div.p: Entry access → bucket removal → frequency increment → bucket insertion

ol.li:
Update linked list pointers:
entry.Prev.Next = entry.Next
entry.Next.Prev = entry.Prev

div.p: Update Entry Fields go oldFreq := entry.Frequency // 1 newFreq := oldFreq + 1 // 2 entry.Frequency = newFreq entry.Recency = time.Now()
Insert at Head (LRU tie-breaking) go entry.Next = bucket.entries if bucket.entries != nil { bucket.entries.Prev = entry } entry.Prev = nil bucket.entries = entry

ul.li: minBucket points to lowest non-empty bucket
Each entry's Prev/Next pointers are consistent
Entry appears in exactly one bucket
Bucket insertion: O(1)* *Sorted insertion requires traversal, but bucket count is typically small
